scripts.build:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm build > wip/build.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/build.$ts.exit; ln -sf build.$ts.log wip/build.log; ln -sf build.$ts.exit wip/build.exit; exit $status
scripts.test:all: pnpm test:packages && pnpm test:examples && pnpm test:integration && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.test:packages:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm test:packages > wip/test-packages.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/test-packages.$ts.exit; ln -sf test-packages.$ts.log wip/test-packages.log; ln -sf test-packages.$ts.exit wip/test-packages.exit; exit $status
scripts.test:e2e:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm test:e2e > wip/test-e2e.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/test-e2e.$ts.exit; ln -sf test-e2e.$ts.log wip/test-e2e.log; ln -sf test-e2e.$ts.exit wip/test-e2e.exit; exit $status
scripts.test:integration:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm test:integration > wip/test-integration.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/test-integration.$ts.exit; ln -sf test-integration.$ts.log wip/test-integration.log; ln -sf test-integration.$ts.exit wip/test-integration.exit; exit $status
scripts.lint:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm lint > wip/lint.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/lint.$ts.exit; ln -sf lint.$ts.log wip/lint.log; ln -sf lint.$ts.exit wip/lint.exit; exit $status
scripts.lint:deps: depcruise --config dependency-cruiser.config.mjs packages && node scripts/lint-framework-target-imports.mjs && node scripts/lint-app-space-id.mjs
scripts.lint:deps:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm lint:deps > wip/lint-deps.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/lint-deps.$ts.exit; ln -sf lint-deps.$ts.log wip/lint-deps.log; ln -sf lint-deps.$ts.exit wip/lint-deps.exit; exit $status
scripts.test:scripts: node --test scripts/lint-workflow-triggers.test.mjs scripts/validate-skills.test.mjs scripts/determine-version-utils.test.ts scripts/check-upgrade-coverage.test.mjs scripts/check-release-notes.test.mjs scripts/set-version-utils.test.ts scripts/check-publish-deps-pn-pins.test.mjs scripts/publish-packages-utils.test.mjs scripts/check-clean-tree.test.mjs scripts/lint-casts.test.mjs scripts/sync-agent-rules.test.mjs scripts/validate-typescript-peer.test.mjs
scripts.fixtures:emit: DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres}" pnpm -r --filter='./examples/*' --filter='./apps/*' --filter='@prisma-next/sql-builder' --filter='@prisma-next/sql-orm-client' --filter='@prisma-next/e2e-tests' --filter='@prisma-next/integration-tests' run --if-present emit && DATABASE_URL="${DATABASE_URL:-postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/postgres}" pnpm -r --filter='./packages/3-extensions/*' run --if-present build:contract-space && pnpm migrations:regen && pnpm migrations:regen:examples
scripts.fixtures:check:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm fixtures:check > wip/fixtures-check.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/fixtures-check.$ts.exit; ln -sf fixtures-check.$ts.log wip/fixtures-check.log; ln -sf fixtures-check.$ts.exit wip/fixtures-check.exit; exit $status
scripts.typecheck:agent: ts=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).$$; pnpm typecheck > wip/typecheck.$ts.log 2>&1; status=$?; echo $status > wip/typecheck.$ts.exit; ln -sf typecheck.$ts.log wip/typecheck.log; ln -sf typecheck.$ts.exit wip/typecheck.exit; exit $status
scripts.prepare: husky && skills add ./skills-contrib --skill '*' --agent universal claude-code -y && node scripts/sync-agent-rules.mjs
